title: Kiosk error object
description: The value of error in an error envelope {ok:false, error:{...}}.

code.description: The closed, stable error vocabulary. Agents branch on code, never on HTTP status alone.

hint.description: Optional remediation pointer (e.g. the known query names on a not_found).

challenges.description: Present ONLY on pow_required; the list of PoW challenges to solve.
